overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character exploring a snowy lakeside environment at night. The character walks across a wooden dock, enters a large abandoned wooden house, moves through dimly lit interior rooms, and exits to explore the overgrown backyard and deserted neighborhood area.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along wooden dock toward the shoreline, weapon visible on back

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks of the dock extending over the frozen water
partially frozen lake with snow-covered edges reflecting moonlight
dense pine forest covering the hillside with snow-laden trees
bright full moon visible in the starry night sky

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a wooden dock extending over a frozen lake under a clear starry night sky. The surrounding landscape features snow-covered pine forests and distant mountains, illuminated by bright moonlight.

events.description: character enters the house through the side garage entrance

agents.ego_description: walking up stone steps toward the house and entering through the side entrance

entered.detail: two-story wooden house with stone foundation and snow-covered roof
low stone walls lining the approach path to the house
wooden pergola structure with red beams near the house entrance
open garage doorway leading into the house interior

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the dock and approaches a large wooden house with stone foundations and a red wooden pergola. The character walks up paved steps and enters the house through a side garage entrance, transitioning from the snowy exterior to the interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned house interior with scattered debris

agents.ego_description: moving through dark interior rooms, passing furniture and debris while heading toward the back exit

entered.detail: dark wooden panel walls lining the interior rooms
brown leather sofa with debris scattered around it
kitchen island with blue base and countertop in the open living area
windows with damaged blinds allowing some exterior light

segments.scene_description: Inside the dimly lit house, the character explores rooms with dark wooden walls, scattered furniture including a leather sofa and kitchen island, and debris covering the floors. The character moves from the entry area through the living space toward a back exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown backyard and abandoned neighborhood street

events.description: character exits house onto back porch and into the overgrown yard

agents.ego_description: exiting the house onto a wooden porch and walking through overgrown yard past abandoned vehicles

entered.detail: wooden deck porch with white railings at the back of the house
derelict white sedan parked in the overgrown yard
lit street lamp illuminating the path and surrounding area
low stone wall running alongside the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The character exits onto a wooden back porch with white railings and steps into an overgrown yard. The scene features abandoned cars, stone walls, and street lamps illuminating the deserted neighborhood area with scattered vegetation and derelict vehicles.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a serene, moonlit lakeside landscape into the decaying interior of an abandoned home and out into a derelict neighborhood. It begins on a wooden dock extending over a frozen lake, surrounded by snow-covered pine forests and distant mountains under a starry night sky. As the character leaves the dock, the camera follows them across the snow toward a large wooden house, moving up paved steps and through a side garage entrance to transition from the cold exterior to the dim interior. The scene then shifts through a series of dark, debris-strewn rooms featuring leather furniture and a kitchen island before moving toward a back exit. Finally, the camera emerges onto a wooden porch with white railings, opening up into an overgrown yard filled with abandoned cars and street lamps that illuminate a deserted residential area.
